service: LinkedIn AIOS — Automated Lead Generation System

challenges.impact: 15+ years of accounting and B2B expertise sits invisible online — while competitors build authority every day
Writing always loses to client work; the posting never happens consistently
System stops the moment your laptop closes — no posting, no research, no lead generation overnight
No system to capture insights from meetings or monitor what competitors are posting and winning with

approach.body:
John's edge isn't generic business advice — it's deep insider knowledge of accounting and property, built across MYOB, JLL, and Yardi. That expertise is the asset. The problem is distribution: it's locked in your head and your meetings instead of reaching accounting firm owners on LinkedIn every day.

The LinkedIn AIOS solves this by turning your existing infrastructure — your AIOS, your meeting notetaker, and your AAA Hub content pillars — into a machine that publishes while you sleep. Running 24/7 on a VPS, it monitors competitor posts for positioning intelligence, pulls insights from your own client conversations, and generates content aligned with your voice and niche.

points.label: Your Existing AIOS
points.description: Extended, not replaced — everything you've built stays and gets supercharged

points.label: Meeting Notetaker
points.description: Client conversations automatically converted into content ideas and drafts

points.label: Competitor Intelligence
points.description: Track what accounting firm owners engage with — post what lands

points.label: AAA Hub Pillars
points.description: Your content strategy drives the engine — consistent voice, not generic AI

items.benefit: System runs 24/7 — posts, researches, and monitors whether your laptop is on or not

items.activity: Connect to your existing AIOS and tools
items.benefit: No rebuilding from scratch — your current setup is extended, not replaced
Insights from client and prospect conversations automatically feed the content engine
Track what accounting and B2B advisory accounts post — use it for positioning and inspiration

items.activity: Claude Code content agent trained on your AAA Hub pillars
items.benefit: Generates posts in your voice, anchored to your content strategy — not generic AI output
Your best ideas come from client conversations; this captures and converts them automatically
Surfaces what's resonating in your niche so you post what accounting firm owners actually engage with
Draft posts queued for your approval before publish — you stay in control of what goes live
Posts go live on schedule without manual action — consistent output even on your busiest days
Frequency and timing optimised for accounting firm owners in the Australian market
Full run-through before handoff — every link in the chain verified live
You know exactly how the system works and how to adjust it as your strategy evolves

investment.roi_framing: A single closed client from LinkedIn typically covers the build cost in full — everything after that is pure ROI.

bonuses.detail: Image generation integrated into the content pipeline — posts with visuals consistently outperform text-only
Custom Vercel dashboard tracking reach, engagement, and lead signals — see exactly what's working
Step-by-step guide to package and sell this system to your accounting firm clients, including a proposal generator — turn your AIOS into a productised offer
Preferential rate applied as a fellow AAA Hub member

next_steps: Confirm — Formal acceptance of this proposal and scope
Payment — 50% deposit to begin, 50% on delivery
Onboarding — Share VPS credentials, existing AIOS setup, and notetaker access so we can begin Day 1
Kick-off call — 30-minute alignment call to lock in content pillars, posting schedule, and go-live target

terms.detail: LinkedIn AIOS build across VPS, Claude Code content agent, Zernio publishing pipeline, and AIOS integrations as described. Excluded: ongoing content management, paid advertising, graphic design; third-party API and VPS costs at client's expense
Bug fixes included for 14 days post-delivery (up to 3 revisions). Change requests outside agreed scope quoted separately.
All systems delivered are client property. Arcaflow retains no ongoing access after handoff unless on retainer.
Client must provide access to VPS, existing AIOS setup, and notetaker before project start. Missing access delays the start date.
